# Transformer & Viz Factory Integrity

The `libs/transformer` and `libs/viz_factory` libraries each have an **Integrity Suite** — an automated CLI runner that verifies every registered action and component against a 1:1:1 test triplet. Run these suites after any wrangling refactor or before opening a PR.

---

## Transformer Integrity Suite

**Script:** `libs/transformer/tests/transformer_integrity_suite.py`

The suite discovers all actions registered in `AVAILABLE_WRANGLING_ACTIONS` and runs them through `debug_wrangler.py` against their corresponding test triplets in `libs/transformer/tests/data/`.

### Running the Suite

```bash
# Full suite — all phases, report saved to tmp/transformer/
./.venv/bin/python libs/transformer/tests/transformer_integrity_suite.py

# Custom output directory
./.venv/bin/python libs/transformer/tests/transformer_integrity_suite.py \
    --output_dir tmp/my_run/
```

**Output:** `tmp/transformer/{date}_transformer_integrity_report.txt`

### Three Phases

| Phase | What it tests | Script called |
|---|---|---|
| **Phase 1 — Atomic Wrangler** | Every registered action via 1:1:1 test triplet | `debug_wrangler.py` |
| **Phase 2 — Relational Audit** | Join / JoinFilter via `relational_audit.yaml` | `debug_assembler.py` |
| **Phase 3 — Assembly Pipelines** | Full pipeline manifests in `assets/template_manifests/` | `debug_assembler.py` |

### Current Status (2026-04-24)

| Category | Actions | Status |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Reshaping | `unpivot`, `explode`, `unnest`, `split_column`, `split_to_list`, `to_struct`, `pivot`, `split_column_to_parts` | 🟢 PASSED |
| Cleaning (Core) | `fill_nulls`, `drop_nulls`, `replace_values`, `rename`, `rename_columns`, `drop_duplicates`, `unique_rows`, `unique`, `sanitize_column_names`, `keep_columns`, `drop_columns`, `strip_whitespace`, `round_numeric`, `filter_range`, `filter_eq`, `add_constant`, `cast`, `coalesce` | 🟢 PASSED |
| Cleaning (Expr) | `regex_extract`, `regex_replace`, `label_if`, `null_if`, `recode_values` | 🟢 PASSED |
| Cleaning (Adv) | `split_and_explode`, `derive_categories`, `divide_columns`, `is_in`, `select_by_pattern`, `coalesce` | 🟢 PASSED |
| Statistical | `count_by_group`, `cum_sum`, `cum_count`, `describe_stats`, `z_score`, `percentile`, `value_counts`, `window_agg`, `horizontal_stats`, `all_horizontal`, `any_horizontal`, `interpolate` | 🟢 PASSED |
| Temporal | `date_extract`, `date_truncate` | 🟢 PASSED |
| List / Struct | `list_join`, `list_slice`, `split_to_list`, `to_struct`, `explode`, `unnest` | 🟢 PASSED |
| Mutation | `mutate`, `add_constant`, `shift`, `sample`, `sort` | 🟢 PASSED |
| Persistence | `sink_parquet`, `scan_parquet` | 🟢 PASSED |
| Relational | `join`, `join_filter` | 🟢 PASSED |
| Performance | `summarize` | 🟢 PASSED |

Total: **62 registered actions, 60 tested, 0 failures**.

---

## Viz Factory Integrity Suite

**Script:** `libs/viz_factory/tests/viz_factory_integrity_suite.py`

Validates every component registered in `PLOT_COMPONENTS` against a test YAML in `libs/viz_factory/tests/test_data/`.

### Running the Suite

```bash
# Full suite — all components, report saved to tmp/viz_factory/
./.venv/bin/python libs/viz_factory/tests/viz_factory_integrity_suite.py
```

**Output:** `tmp/viz_factory/viz_factory_integrity_report.txt`

**Current status:** 172/172 components PASSED (geoms, scales, themes, facets, coords, positions, guides, stats, elements).

---

## Individual Debug Scripts

### `debug_wrangler.py` — Test a single manifest (Layer 1)

Runs the Tier 1 wrangling path from a manifest against a dataset. Mirrors the orchestrator's Layer 1 logic exactly.

```bash
./.venv/bin/python libs/transformer/tests/debug_wrangler.py \
    --manifest libs/transformer/tests/data/strip_whitespace_manifest.yaml

# Override data source
./.venv/bin/python libs/transformer/tests/debug_wrangler.py \
    --manifest config/manifests/pipelines/my_pipeline.yaml \
    --data assets/test_data/my_project/

# Write output TSV
./.venv/bin/python libs/transformer/tests/debug_wrangler.py \
    --manifest libs/transformer/tests/data/derive_categories_manifest.yaml \
    --output tmp/my_test_output.tsv

# Run only tier1 or tier2
./.venv/bin/python libs/transformer/tests/debug_wrangler.py \
    --manifest my_manifest.yaml --tier tier1
```

**Arguments:**

| Argument | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `--manifest` | Yes | — | Path to YAML manifest |
| `--data` | No | manifest `source.path` | Override data source directory |
| `--output` | No | `tmp/` | Output path for the materialized TSV |
| `--tier` | No | `all` | Which tier to run: `tier1`, `tier2`, `all` |

---

### `debug_assembler.py` — Test a pipeline assembly (Layer 2)

Runs the full Layer 2 assembly: ingests all datasets, applies Tier 1 wrangling, executes the assembly recipe (joins), and applies the `final_contract`. Mirrors orchestrator behaviour exactly.

```bash
./.venv/bin/python libs/transformer/tests/debug_assembler.py \
    --manifest config/manifests/pipelines/my_pipeline.yaml

# Override data directory
./.venv/bin/python libs/transformer/tests/debug_assembler.py \
    --manifest my_pipeline.yaml \
    --data assets/test_data/my_project/

# Write output to a specific directory
./.venv/bin/python libs/transformer/tests/debug_assembler.py \
    --manifest my_pipeline.yaml \
    --output tmp/my_assembly_run/

# --output also accepts a file path — the parent directory is used
./.venv/bin/python libs/transformer/tests/debug_assembler.py \
    --manifest my_pipeline.yaml \
    --output tmp/my_assembly_run/result.tsv
```

**Arguments:**

| Argument | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `--manifest` | Yes | — | Path to pipeline manifest YAML |
| `--data` | No | `assets/test_data/` | Override source data directory |
| `--output` | No | `tmp/` | Output directory (or file path — parent dir is used) |
| `--tmp` | No | `tmp/` | Alias for `--output` |

**Outputs written per assembly:**

- `EVE_assembly_{id}.parquet` — pre-contract intermediate
- `EVE_contracted_{id}.parquet` — post-`final_contract` result
- `EVE_contracted_{id}.tsv` — human-readable audit export

---

### `debug_runner.py` — Test a single viz component

Tests one VizFactory component from a recipe manifest. Prints a data glimpse and saves the rendered plot.

```bash
./.venv/bin/python libs/viz_factory/tests/debug_runner.py \
    --manifest libs/viz_factory/tests/test_data/geom_bar_test.yaml \
    --output tmp/viz_test/geom_bar.png
```

---

### `debug_wrangler_errors.py` — Test error detection

Verifies that DataWrangler raises correct, user-friendly errors when manifests reference non-existent columns (typo detection with fuzzy suggestions).

```bash
./.venv/bin/python libs/transformer/tests/debug_wrangler_errors.py
```

No file I/O — runs fully in-memory, prints PASS/FAIL to stdout.

---

### `debug_phase3_refinements.py` — Test persistence hashing

Verifies the `sink_parquet` short-circuit logic: first run materialises, second run short-circuits, third run with a changed recipe invalidates the cache.

```bash
./.venv/bin/python libs/transformer/tests/debug_phase3_refinements.py

# Custom parquet path
./.venv/bin/python libs/transformer/tests/debug_phase3_refinements.py \
    --output tmp/my_hash_test.parquet
```

---

### `debug_viz_factory_tier3.py` — Test Tier 3 predicate pushdown

Verifies that VizFactory correctly applies filter predicates before rendering.

```bash
./.venv/bin/python libs/viz_factory/tests/debug_viz_factory_tier3.py

# Save the rendered plot
./.venv/bin/python libs/viz_factory/tests/debug_viz_factory_tier3.py \
    --output tmp/tier3_test.png
```

---

### `debug_expressions.py` — Test expression-based actions

Tests the expression-cleaning action module directly.

```bash
./.venv/bin/python libs/transformer/tests/debug_expressions.py \
    --manifest libs/transformer/tests/data/label_if_manifest.yaml
```

---

### `debug_relational_audit.py` — Relational join audit

Standalone relational join audit — verifies join integrity between two datasets.

```bash
./.venv/bin/python libs/transformer/tests/debug_relational_audit.py \
    --manifest libs/transformer/tests/data/relational_audit.yaml \
    --output tmp/relational_audit/
```

---

### `debug_decorator_suite.py` — Bulk decorator CI

Scans `libs/transformer/tests/data/` for `*_manifest.yaml` triplets and runs each through `debug_wrangler.py`. Produces a PASS/FAIL table.

```bash
./.venv/bin/python libs/transformer/tests/debug_decorator_suite.py
```

---

### `debug_pipeline.py` — Test the PipelineExecutor

Tests the `PipelineExecutor` abstraction directly.

```bash
./.venv/bin/python libs/transformer/tests/debug_pipeline.py \
    --manifest my_manifest.yaml \
    --data-dir assets/test_data/my_project/
```

---

### `debug_distiller.py` — Test the VizFactory distiller

Tests the distiller (data-to-plot-spec conversion) stage in isolation.

```bash
./.venv/bin/python libs/viz_factory/tests/debug_distiller.py \
    --out tmp/distiller_test.png
```

---

### `debug_audit.py` — VizFactory component audit

Audits the viz_factory component registry for coverage gaps relative to the task list.

```bash
./.venv/bin/python libs/viz_factory/tests/debug_audit.py
# With report
./.venv/bin/python libs/viz_factory/tests/debug_audit.py --report
```

---

### `debug_bulk_sync.py` — Gallery bulk sync

Runs a bulk synchronization pass over `assets/gallery_data/` recipe manifests to ensure gallery components are in sync with the registry.

```bash
./.venv/bin/python libs/viz_factory/tests/debug_bulk_sync.py
```

---

## The 1:1:1 Naming Law

Every registered transformer action **must** have a matching test triplet:

| File | Path | Description |
|---|---|---|
| **Action** | `libs/transformer/src/transformer/actions/<module>/<action>.py` | The registered `@register_action` function |
| **Manifest** | `libs/transformer/tests/data/<action>_manifest.yaml` | ADR-041 Rich Dict manifest for the action |
| **Data** | `libs/transformer/tests/data/<action>_test.tsv` | Minimal input TSV |

An action is not considered complete until its triplet exists and the full integrity suite passes.
